articles.title: Trump Extends Ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's Request
articles.description: US President Donald Trump announced extension of the two-week ceasefire with Iran, originally set to expire April 22, citing Pakistan's request for extended talks.

articles.title: US Forces Board Sanctioned Oil Tanker in Indian Ocean
articles.description: Pentagon announced US forces boarded a sanctioned oil tanker in the Indian Ocean as part of naval operations enforcing blockade on Iran.

articles.title: US Military Pushes for 2027 Spending Boost on Drones and Air Defenses
articles.description: US military leadership requested increased 2027 budget allocations for drone and air defense systems deployed during Iran war operations.

articles.title: Trump Says Ceasefire Extension Highly Unlikely Without Deal
articles.description: President Trump stated ceasefire will likely end April 23 if Iran deal not reached, with Vice President JD Vance preparing departure for Islamabad talks.

articles.title: Pakistan Mediates Second Round of US-Iran Peace Talks
articles.description: Second phase of US-Iran negotiations scheduled in Islamabad April 23 with VP Vance, envoy Witkoff, and Jared Kushner on US side; Iran's Ghalibaf expected to lead Iranian delegation.

articles.title: Iran Reopens Major Airports After War-Related Closures
articles.description: Iran reopened Imam Khomeini and Mehrabad airports after weeks of closures, signaling partial normalization as ceasefire holds.

articles.title: Iran Rejects US Demands Under Threat, Conditions Remain Unchanged
articles.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei stated US is not learning from experience, rejecting ceasefire terms and insisting Iran will not negotiate under shadow of US naval blockade.

articles.title: Iran Threatens Response to US Naval Blockade
articles.description: Tehran called US seizure of sanctioned ships 'piracy' and threatened retribution; IRGC Navy warned military vessels approaching Strait would trigger 'severe response.'

articles.title: Iran Delegates Uncertain About Islamabad Talks Attendance
articles.description: Pakistan's information minister reported Iran's decision on delegation attendance for April 23 Islamabad talks still pending; sources indicate possible participation by Ghalibaf and Araghchi.

articles.title: Iran Proposes 10-Point Peace Plan Rejected by Pakistan
articles.description: Iran rejected Pakistan's draft ceasefire framework and issued own 10-point plan including sanctions relief, war reparations, and restoration of Iranian Strait of Hormuz sovereignty.
